title: Implement a plant nutrition program
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Implement a plant nutrition program demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for implementation of the plant nutrition program

pcs.text: Identify goals, target site, plant species and varieties for implementing the program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify goals, target site, plant species and varieties for implementing the program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify goals, target site, plant species and varieties for implementing the program.

pcs.text: Locate services using site plans or consultation with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Locate services using site plans or consultation with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Locate services using site plans or consultation with supervisor.

pcs.text: Identify potential hazards and risks, and identify safe working practices to manage risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify potential hazards and risks, and identify safe working practices to manage risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify potential hazards and risks, and identify safe working practices to manage risks.

pcs.text: Confirm environmental and biosecurity implications associated with plant nutrition program activities, and minimise impact
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm environmental and biosecurity implications associated with plant nutrition program activities, and minimise impact?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm environmental and biosecurity implications associated with plant nutrition program activities, and minimise impact.

pcs.text: Select, fit use and maintain personal protective equipment applicable to the task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit use and maintain personal protective equipment applicable to the task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit use and maintain personal protective equipment applicable to the task.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for implementation of the plant nutrition program

elements.title: Identify and assess soil or growing media characteristics

pcs.text: Assess site soil or growing media characteristics, including pH, in relation to plant nutrition
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess site soil or growing media characteristics, including pH, in relation to plant nutrition?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess site soil or growing media characteristics, including pH, in relation to plant nutrition.

pcs.text: Identify, compare, select and source ameliorants to improve soil or growing media characteristics or fertility
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify, compare, select and source ameliorants to improve soil or growing media characteristics or fertility?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify, compare, select and source ameliorants to improve soil or growing media characteristics or fertility.

pcs.text: Assess product application methods according to product type and growing media
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess product application methods according to product type and growing media?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess product application methods according to product type and growing media.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Identify and assess soil or growing media characteristics

elements.title: Determine nutritional problems in plants

pcs.text: Conduct a visual inspection and identify common nutrient deficiency and toxicity problems in plants
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct a visual inspection and identify common nutrient deficiency and toxicity problems in plants?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct a visual inspection and identify common nutrient deficiency and toxicity problems in plants.

pcs.text: Determine causes of nutritional or toxicity problems, and confirm with supervisor or horticulturalist, as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine causes of nutritional or toxicity problems, and confirm with supervisor or horticulturalist, as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine causes of nutritional or toxicity problems, and confirm with supervisor or horticulturalist, as required.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Determine nutritional problems in plants

elements.title: Prepare to use fertilisers

pcs.text: Select a fertiliser that is compatible with plant species and growing media according to nutrition program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select a fertiliser that is compatible with plant species and growing media according to nutrition program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select a fertiliser that is compatible with plant species and growing media according to nutrition program.

pcs.text: Assess fertiliser application methods, taking into account the fertiliser type, soils and environmental implications according to nutrition program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess fertiliser application methods, taking into account the fertiliser type, soils and environmental implications according to nutrition program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess fertiliser application methods, taking into account the fertiliser type, soils and environmental implications according to nutrition program.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Prepare to use fertilisers

elements.title: Prepare application equipment

pcs.text: Select tools, equipment and machinery appropriate for the plant application being performed, and check for safe operation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select tools, equipment and machinery appropriate for the plant application being performed, and check for safe operation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select tools, equipment and machinery appropriate for the plant application being performed, and check for safe operation.

pcs.text: Calibrate and adjust tools, equipment and machinery
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calibrate and adjust tools, equipment and machinery?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calibrate and adjust tools, equipment and machinery.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Prepare application equipment

elements.title: Apply specific products at appropriate rates

pcs.text: Calculate product application rates to optimise plant benefit and minimise environmental impact according to nutrition program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calculate product application rates to optimise plant benefit and minimise environmental impact according to nutrition program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate product application rates to optimise plant benefit and minimise environmental impact according to nutrition program.

pcs.text: Apply products with the correct rate, timing and method according to the product type, plant needs and with consideration of the environmental implications and according to nutrition program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply products with the correct rate, timing and method according to the product type, plant needs and with consideration of the environmental implications and according to nutrition program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply products with the correct rate, timing and method according to the product type, plant needs and with consideration of the environmental implications and according to nutrition program.

pcs.text: Apply fertilisers appropriate to the plant growing cycle, workplace fertiliser schedule and nutrition program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply fertilisers appropriate to the plant growing cycle, workplace fertiliser schedule and nutrition program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply fertilisers appropriate to the plant growing cycle, workplace fertiliser schedule and nutrition program.

pcs.text: Record product applications according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record product applications according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record product applications according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Monitor, document and report target plant response to the plant nutrition program, as well as non-target effects or responses according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor, document and report target plant response to the plant nutrition program, as well as non-target effects or responses according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor, document and report target plant response to the plant nutrition program, as well as non-target effects or responses according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E6: Apply specific products at appropriate rates

elements.title: Complete plant nutrition program activities

pcs.text: Remove and dispose of waste material according to workplace and environmental requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Remove and dispose of waste material according to workplace and environmental requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove and dispose of waste material according to workplace and environmental requirements.

pcs.text: Clean, maintain and return tools, equipment and machinery to required location
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean, maintain and return tools, equipment and machinery to required location?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean, maintain and return tools, equipment and machinery to required location.

pcs.text: Identify and report unserviceable tools, equipment and machinery according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and report unserviceable tools, equipment and machinery according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and report unserviceable tools, equipment and machinery according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Record and report plant nutrition program activities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record and report plant nutrition program activities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record and report plant nutrition program activities.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E7: Complete plant nutrition program activities

common_gaps_or_errors: Unable to specify workplace-relevant requirements or conditions

what_to_look_for: Accurate technical knowledge of calibrate and adjust tools, equipment and machinery
minimum_expected_knowledge: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calibrate and adjust tools, equipment and machinery.
indicators_of_partial_understanding: Knows the general concept but cannot specify technical detail
indicators_of_strong_understanding: Demonstrates precise, contextual, technically accurate knowledge with workplace application
